name: @axidev/io
description: Node/Electron main-process wrapper around the native axidev-io keyboard library
author: Axidev

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && rollup -c
scripts.build:release: npm run build && npm run build:native && npm run stage:prebuilt
scripts.clean: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('node:fs').rmSync('prebuilds', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('node:fs').rmSync('build', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('node:fs').rmSync('vendor/axidev-io/build', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.rebuild: npm run build:native && npm run stage:prebuilt
scripts.test:consumer:esm: node scripts/install-test-package.mjs && npm --prefix test-package run hello
